commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
commands.postchange_default_c8: env -u HIPENGINE_QWEN35_PROJECTION_DISPATCH_ARTIFACT HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --batch-size 8 --decode-tokens 128 ... after default edit
commands.postchange_matrix: env -u HIPENGINE_QWEN35_PROJECTION_DISPATCH_ARTIFACT HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --batch-size {2,4,8} --decode-tokens 128 ... after default edit
commands.prechange_controls: env -u HIPENGINE_QWEN35_PROJECTION_DISPATCH_ARTIFACT HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --batch-size {2,4,8} --decode-tokens 128 ... before default edit

conclusion: C8 all-minus-layer31 rowchunk scope is the current narrowest repeated-green c8 diagnostic: explicit rowchunk layers 3,7,11,15,19,23,27,35,39 were 3/3 green at [137]*8, so the no-flag c8 default was promoted from all-layer rowchunk2 to that layer list. Post-change no-flag c8 stayed [137]*8 with row_chunked_layers=[3,7,11,15,19,23,27,35,39], and the post-change no-flag c2/c4/c8 matrix stayed green (c2 [137,137], c4 [137]*4, c8 [137]*8). This narrows the c8 rowchunk diagnostic by leaving layer 31 native, but remains evidence-only because selected rowchunk layers keep native_caware_decode=false and no retained throughput/scaling claim is made.

prompt_verifier.evidence: PASS: this materially advances c8 full-attention runtime correctness by narrowing the no-flag c8 rowchunk diagnostic after repeated generated-token green evidence and preserving c2/c4/c8 equality on GPU1/XTX. It is not schema/docs-only work, and no retained performance claim is made.

active_verify.decision_reason: artifact_path must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; primitive_correctness_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; c1_baseline_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; scaling comparison vs c=1 and serial bridge baselines is incomplete; profiler trace was not captured with expected kernels present; profiler.artifact_path must be under benchmarks/results; profiler.source_artifact_path must be a non-empty string; profiler.output_format must be csv; profiler.trace_dir must be a non-empty string; profiler.trace_files must be a non-empty string list; profiler.synthesized_fields must be a string list; profiler.status must be captured; profiler.expected_kernels_present must be true; profiler.trace_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.expected_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.kernel_durations_ns must be a non-empty object; profiler kernel names must include selected projection_dispatch candidate or variant; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.requested_mode must be batched_lm_head; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.native_row_aware_lm_head must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.mode must be batched_lm_head; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.c2_equality_green must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.equality_rows must be an int; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.equality_artifact must be under benchmarks/results; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns has no observations; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns observation count must cover graph_bucket_stats.hits
